race.description: Happy Birthday Yvette Hadfield Provincial Hcp (Bm68)
race.comment: COSY CORNER (3) stalked the pace then tried hard but was edged out when resuming over 1200m here last start. Capable sprinter who probably needed that run last time. Maps perfectly and will be tougher to resist this afternoon. HIDDEN STAR (6) made it two in a row when she got home comfortably in a Class 1 over 1200m here last Saturday. Like the quick back-up of a filly in outstanding form. Big chance to chalk up another one. OAKFIELD NEPTUNE (4) led from the outset and gave nothing else a chance when resuming over this course and distance recently. Sparingly raced mare who takes on the boys today but she looks up to the task. RIVER PAT (8) is rarely far away in this sort of race. Draws a lovely gate so keep her in mind.
